evals.prompt: research the tradeoffs between SQLite and PostgreSQL for a side project that might grow
evals.expected_output: A structured research summary covering: how each DB works, when to use each, tradeoffs (setup, scalability, concurrency, tooling), and a practical recommendation for a growing side project. Multiple angles covered in parallel.

evals.prompt: look into how React Server Components work and when I should actually use them
evals.expected_output: A thorough breakdown of RSC: the underlying model, rendering pipeline, when they shine vs when to use client components, ecosystem support (Next.js etc), and real-world gotchas.

evals.prompt: deep dive on vector databases — what they are, which ones exist, and how to pick one
evals.expected_output: Coverage of: what vector DBs are and how similarity search works, major options (Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma, pgvector, etc.), comparison criteria, and guidance on selecting based on use case.
